releaseNotes:
Reliability and model configuration update.

Fixes:
- Reduced chat UI stalls during long agent runs by throttling live render updates and reusing message visuals
- DeepSeek 1M mode now keeps official API model names on the wire while enabling the local 1M context budget
- Added thinking depth controls with Auto, Off, Low, Medium, High, and Max presets
- Normalized legacy DeepSeek [1m] model names and added regression coverage for provider request shaping
